pov_and_distance: {'dominant_pov': 'third_person_limited', 'information_control': 'strategic_withholding_through_concealed_capabilities', 'dramatic_irony_maintenance': 'core_structural_element—reader_access_to_protagonist_knowledge_exceeds_all_character_access', 'distance_calibration': 'close_enough_for_competence_perception, distant_enough_to_enable_plot_discovery', 'notes': 'POV discipline critical to maintaining concealment mechanics—protagonist knowledge (foreknowledge, hidden cultivation, transmigrator nature) must never accidentally surface in unfiltered character awareness without deliberate plot reason'}

hooking_and_transitions: end units on changed state, unresolved question, or sharper constraint
adaptation_guidelines: translate craft controls into the new project's genre, cast, and premise
change imagery fields, sentence signatures, names, and scenario chains
taboo_copy_signals: source titles, author names, exact phrases, named entities, and distinctive sentence templates
